Eugene Airport reports rental car shortage
EUGENE, Ore. -- A heads up for travelers - Eugene Airport officials say rental cars at the airport are in high demand, and that means cars are running low.They say spring break and their growing airport are both to blame...

The National Rifle Association is facing a corporate backlash as companies take a closer look at their investments, co-branding deals and other ties to the gun industry following the latest school massacre.A handful of companies have ended discount program
